vibe: Clinical Precision & Calm. Professional, trustworthy, reducing cognitive load for surgeons.

layout_spacing.alignment: Left-align form inputs and data grids; optical alignment for icons.

navigation.style: Vertical sidebar for desktop (collapsible), bottom/hamburger for mobile. bg-[#F0F0EE] border-r border-[#E5E5E2].

fdi_dental_chart.description: Interactive horizontal UI mapping teeth using FDI 2-digit system. Quadrant 1/4 (Right), Quadrant 2/3 (Left).
fdi_dental_chart.layout: Grid table or symmetric U-shape mirror. Split top (18-11 | 21-28) and bottom (48-41 | 31-38).
fdi_dental_chart.interactions: Clickable tooth elements, tooltips for statuses, distinct colors for missing vs. treated vs. healthy.

implant_log_form.style: Multi-step or segmented tabs using Shadcn Tabs. Left-aligned labels, generous input heights.

cards.style: Neumorphic subtle depth or flat 1px border. No heavy drop shadows. Focus state adds ring-2 ring-primary/50.

image_urls.description: Serene abstract geometric background for Login/Signup screens to impart a premium feel.
High-quality closeup of a dental implant for dashboard empty states or 'No active logs' placeholders.
Placeholder for dentist profile picture during registration and dashboard header.

motion_accessibility.contrast: Ensure text contrast on buttons > 4.5:1. Primary text on surface > 7:1.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install `@phosphor-icons/react` for the clinical precision icon set.
Use Shadcn/UI for Forms, Inputs, Selects, Tabs, and Dialogs. Apply custom styling from the 'colors' and 'typography' objects.
Implement the FDI Dental Chart with a responsive CSS Grid mirroring the dentist's perspective. Ensure interactive states for clicking teeth to add implant logs.
For the implant specs, use precise grouped fields (e.g., Torque, Size, Brand, Hex, Conical) with Shadcn Select and Inputs.
Build the multi-clinic registration with dependent dropdowns (Country -> Registration Number -> College Name selection/manual entry).
Incorporate a 90-day Osseointegration counter widget in the patient dashboard using progress rings or timeline charts.
Financial analysis and analytics should use 'recharts' configured with the designated theme colors.
